moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships are underway at the All England Club, running from June 29 to July 12, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis action.

angles.name: General Buzz
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are officially back! Wimbledon 2026 is serving up aces and drama for the next two weeks. Who's your pick for the title?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: The grass courts of SW19 are buzzing! Our British hopefuls are hitting the courts at Wimbledon. Who are you cheering on?

moments.title: World Cup Knockout Stages
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America has entered its thrilling knockout stages, with Round of 32 matches currently underway until July 3rd.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: It's do-or-die time! The FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stages are in full swing. Who's making it through to the next round?

angles.name: Big Games Ahead
angles.copy: Every game matters now! The World Cup Round of 32 is delivering non-stop drama. Don't miss the upcoming fixtures!

moments.title: UK Set for Another Heatwave
moments.blurb: Forecasters predict another heatwave for the UK, with temperatures expected to rise significantly from July 5-7, potentially hitting 38C in parts of the South East by July 8.

angles.name: Heatwave Warning
angles.copy: Get ready to feel the heat again! Another UK heatwave is on the cards for next week, with temperatures soaring. Stay cool and hydrated!

angles.name: Local Impact
angles.copy: Devon, get ready for some serious sunshine! Temperatures are set to climb next week, so dust off those fans and get the ice cream in.

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Series 13, hosted by Maya Jama, is in full swing, airing nightly from Sunday to Friday on ITV2 and ITVX after kicking off on June 1st.

angles.name: Daily Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of villa drama! Love Island UK is providing all the summer feels (and arguments). Who's your favourite couple right now?

angles.name: Unseen Bits
angles.copy: Catching up on all the 'Unseen Bits' from the Love Island villa this weekend? Iain Stirling's narration is always gold!

moments.title: Glastonbury Fallow Year
moments.blurb: Glastonbury Festival is taking its traditional 'fallow year' in 2026, meaning there is no festival at Worthy Farm this summer to allow the land to recover.

angles.name: Missing the Mud
angles.copy: No Pyramid Stage this year! It's a Glastonbury fallow year, giving Worthy Farm a well-deserved break. What's your favourite Glasto memory?

angles.name: Festival Blues
angles.copy: Feeling the absence of Glastonbury this summer? The fields are quiet, but the memories of past festivals live on! What's your dream headliner for 2027?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Wrap-Up
moments.blurb: TRNSMT Festival 2026, featuring headliners like Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi, concluded on June 21st at Glasgow Green.

angles.name: Festival Highlights
angles.copy: Still buzzing from TRNSMT? What was your highlight from Glasgow Green this year? Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian or Lewis Capaldi?

angles.name: Post-Festival Vibes
angles.copy: The dust has settled on TRNSMT 2026! Who delivered the best set and left you wanting more?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Missy Elliott
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott turns 55 on July 1st.

angles.name: Iconic Artist
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott! Which of her groundbreaking tracks gets you moving every time?

angles.name: Producer Legend
angles.copy: A true legend of music production and performance, Missy Elliott turns 55 today! From 'Get Ur Freak On' to 'Work It', what's your favourite Missy moment?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ralph Johnson
moments.blurb: Ralph Johnson, percussionist and vocalist for the legendary band Earth, Wind & Fire, celebrates his 75th birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Funk & Soul Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 75th Birthday to Ralph Johnson of the incredible Earth, Wind & Fire! What's your go-to EWF track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actor Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, turns 76 on July 5th.

angles.name: 80s Legend
angles.copy: It's the Heart of Rock & Roll's birthday! Happy 76th to Huey Lewis! Which classic Huey Lewis and the News song is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Nick O'Malley
moments.blurb: Arctic Monkeys bassist Nick O'Malley celebrates his 41st birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Indie Rock Star
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to Arctic Monkeys' bassist, Nick O'Malley! What's your favourite Arctic Monkeys album?

moments.title: Happy Birthday John Keeble
moments.blurb: John Keeble, drummer for the iconic New Romantic band Spandau Ballet, turns 67 on July 6th.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Gold! Happy 67th Birthday to John Keeble, drummer for Spandau Ballet! What's your favourite Spandau hit?

moments.title: Happy Birthday 50 Cent
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Mogul
angles.copy: Go Shorty, it's your birthday! Happy 51st to the legendary 50 Cent. What's your favourite track from the 'Get Rich or Die Tryin'' icon?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles song featuring Ringo on drums?

angles.name: Solo & Beyond
angles.copy: From The Beatles to his All Starr Band, Ringo Starr is still going strong at 86! Celebrate his birthday with some classic tracks.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Perrie Edwards
moments.blurb: Singer Perrie Edwards, known for her work with Little Mix and her solo career, turns 33 on July 7th.

angles.name: Pop Star
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the amazing Perrie Edwards! What's your favourite Little Mix track or solo bop from Perrie?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jack White
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning musician, singer, songwriter, and producer Jack White, known for The White Stripes and his solo work, turns 51 on July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Innovator
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible Jack White! From The White Stripes to The Raconteurs and his solo career, what's your top Jack White track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Courtney Love
moments.blurb: Singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, frontwoman of Hole, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the iconic Courtney Love! What's your favourite Hole anthem or solo track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Neil Tennant
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, lead singer of the hugely influential synth-pop duo Pet Shop Boys, turns 72 on July 10th.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Pioneer
angles.copy: It's a West End Girl's birthday! Happy 72nd to Pet Shop Boys frontman Neil Tennant. What's your favourite PSB classic?

moments.title: 'Elle' Premieres on Prime Video
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated 'Legally Blonde' prequel series, 'Elle', following a teenage Elle Woods, premieres on Prime Video on July 1st.

angles.name: Legally Blonde Prequel
angles.copy: Bend and snap! The 'Legally Blonde' prequel series 'Elle' drops on Prime Video tomorrow! Who's excited to see teenage Elle Woods?

angles.name: New Streaming
angles.copy: Calling all 'Legally Blonde' fans! A brand new prequel series, 'Elle', arrives on Prime Video tomorrow. Get ready for more pink and sass!

moments.title: 'The Dark' on ITV/Netflix
moments.blurb: A new ITV crime thriller, 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, is set to premiere in July, with some sources also mentioning Netflix.

angles.name: Crime Thriller Alert
angles.copy: If you love a good crime thriller, keep an eye out for 'The Dark' arriving on ITV this July! Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale star.

angles.name: New Series
angles.copy: Looking for your next TV obsession? 'The Dark', a moody new crime drama, is coming to screens this month. Get ready for twists and tension!
